goal: compose[T, U, V](e.map, h.map) = compose[T, U, V](e.map, k.map)
compose[T, U, V](h.map, e.map) = compose[T, U, V](k.map, e.map)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k).map
compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e).map = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e).map
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, h) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](e, k) = (h = k)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e)
compose_bijection[T, U, V](h, e) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](k, e) = (h = k)
inverse_bijection[U, T](inverse_bijection[T, U](e)) = inverse_bijection[U, T](inverse_bijection[T, U](h))

proof: inverse_bijection[T, U](h).map = inverse_bijection[T, U](e).map or h = e

goal: compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, c) = compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, d)
proof: compose_bijection[T, V, W](a, compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, d)) != compose_bijection[T, V, W](a, compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, c))
compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, d) != compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, c)
compose_bijection[T, V, W](a, compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, d)) != compose_bijection[T, V, W](a, compose_bijection[T, U, V](b, c))

goal: compose_bijection[U, W, T](c, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b)) = compose_bijection[U, W, T](d, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b))
proof: compose_bijection[U, W, T](c, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b)) != compose_bijection[U, V, T](compose_bijection[V, W, T](d, a), b)
compose_bijection[U, W, T](c, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b)) = compose_bijection[U, V, T](compose_bijection[V, W, T](d, a), b)
compose_bijection[U, W, T](d, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b)) != compose_bijection[U, W, T](c, compose_bijection[U, V, W](a, b))
compose_bijection[U, V, T](compose_bijection[V, W, T](d, a), b) != compose_bijection[U, V, T](compose_bijection[V, W, T](c, a), b)
